generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects real-time occupancy status data from building spaces using IoT sensors, integrated as semantically enriched devices in BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures environmental temperature conditions in building zones, transmitting data via Eclipse Hono for real-time ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance LuminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors lighting levels across building spaces, providing input for adaptive lighting control systems like BOREALIS."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminanceDataStream
]

instance CO2Monitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks indoor air quality via CO2 concentration measurements, integrated into BIM for ventilation system optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Records real-time energy consumption data from building systems, enabling predictive analytics for operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance BuildingAutomationSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Aggregates data from multiple BAS components (HVAC, lighting, etc.) and transmits normalized streams via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingAutomationDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data stream normalized and transmitted via Eclipse Hono for DT ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature data stream processed through Eclipse Hono for bidirectional DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LuminanceDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Lighting condition data stream used by BOREALIS for reinforcement learning-based optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminanceSensor
]

instance AirQualityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration data stream integrated into BIM for ventilation system control logic."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Monitor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics streamed for predictive analytics and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance BuildingAutomationDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Aggregated BAS data stream containing HVAC, lighting, and other system telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingAutomationSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational semantic backbone representing static and dynamic building assets with enriched device metadata."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Metadata model containing sensor/actuator configurations, control logic, and integration endpoints."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and lighting control strategies (TwinLight) embedded in BIM."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance RuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized operational data from IoT sensors and BAS, integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream, LuminanceDataStream, AirQualityDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream, BuildingAutomationDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Device metadata including tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses for middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT device connectivity framework enabling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors via standardized protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, DeviceMetadataIntegrationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform supporting bidirectional communication, multi-tenancy, and runtime configuration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinSynchronizationService, ControlPolicyExecutionService, MultiTenantManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine providing rich, interactive interfaces for immersive building performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, ImmersiveDashboardService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generation of runtime interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService, ArtifactGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ingests and normalizes real-time sensor data streams from Eclipse Hono for DT processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DeviceMetadataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrates sensor/actuator metadata into BIM models for semantic enrichment."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Maintains bidirectional synchronization between physical and virtual representations using Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationFidelityInsight
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and lighting control strategies (TwinLight) in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance MultiTenantManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages multi-tenancy configurations and access controls for DT deployments."
    DTDFVocab:provides TenantIsolationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders 3D visualizations in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive building performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance ImmersiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time dashboards with interactive 3D representations of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboardInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates BIM models for semantic consistency and AECO compliance before deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelComplianceInsight
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates runtime interfaces and configurations from BIM models using MDE."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentArtifactInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs predictive analytics on energy consumption and occupancy patterns using historical and real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyForecastInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes building performance simulations for design decisions and refurbishment planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutcomeInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Configures lighting control systems (TwinLight) with domain-specific semantics embedded in BIM."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningConfigurationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides up-to-date visualization of building operational parameters from sensor data streams."
]

instance DeviceConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays integrated sensor/actuator configurations within BIM environment."
]

instance SynchronizationFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantifies Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric for synchronization quality."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates automated control signals for energy-efficient lighting adjustments using BOREALIS RL policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TenantIsolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitors multi-tenancy configurations and access control policies in DT deployments."
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offers interactive 3D exploration of building performance metrics in Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance OperationalDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides facility managers with real-time operational overview through immersive dashboards."
]

instance ModelComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validates BIM model compliance with AECO standards before deployment."
]

instance DeploymentArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates and validates runtime artifacts for DT deployment."
]

instance EnergyForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicts energy consumption patterns based on historical and real-time operational data."
]

instance SimulationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Presents results of building performance simulations for decision-making support."
]

    base:desc "Automates initial configuration of lighting control systems using TwinLight framework."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls adaptive lighting systems with dynamic optimization for energy consumption and visual comfort."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Regulates heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems based on real-time sensor data."
]

instance ShadingMechanism : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts window shading systems to optimize natural light utilization and energy efficiency."
]

instance PLCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable logic controller managing building automation systems and actuator coordination."
]

instance IoTEnabledDevice : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Bidirectional IoT device executing control logic received from the digital twin."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including academic, commercial, and residential facilities."
    base:contains BimModel, DeviceMetadataModel, ControlPolicyModel, VisualizationModel
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual representation of building infrastructure with real-time synchronization capabilities."
    base:contains RuntimeData, SensorMetadata, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ShadingMechanism, PLCController, IoTEnabledDevice
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, allowing the DT to send **control commands** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) back to the physical actuators. The DT services, such as **optimization algorithms** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) or **user-defined control strategies** (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control), generate these commands based on real-time data and predefined logic. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, enabling dynamic adjustments without full redeployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sensor data update rates** (e.g., environmental sensors may update every few seconds, while occupancy data may be event-driven). The framework supports **continuous synchronization** between the PT and DT, with **runtime configuration management** enabling dynamic adjustments to data refresh rates. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the temporal fidelity of the twinning process."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM-based core**: Hosts the semantic model and device configurations.
  - **Middleware layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
  - **Visualization layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  - **Service layer**: Custom plugins and analytics (e.g., RL-based optimization in BOREALIS).
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating third-party services or domain-specific tools. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure environments, with **modularity** enabling incremental upgrades or replacements of components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the entire **building life cycle**, from **design and construction (as-designed phase)** to **operational phases (as-manufactured and as-operated)**. It supports:
  - **Design-phase integration**: Leveraging BIM models for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction-phase synchronization**: Incorporating as-built data and commissioning information.
  - **Operational-phase optimization**: Using real-time sensor data and adaptive control strategies (e.g., BOREALIS’s RL-based lighting optimization).
  - **Refurbishment and adaptation**: Enabling dynamic updates to the DT to reflect physical changes or evolving requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic coherence**: BIM’s object-based modeling ensures accurate representation of physical assets and their relationships.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto provide **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing drift between PT and DT.
  - **Validation mechanisms**: The **ODTE metric** quantifies the entanglement between the digital and physical twins, identifying discrepancies or synchronization errors.
  - **Uncertainty management**: The framework supports **probabilistic models** (e.g., RL-based policies in BOREALIS) to account for sensor noise or incomplete data.
  - **Verification and validation (V&V)**: Automated checks during the **model-driven deployment** phase ensure compliance with AECO standards and operational requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for technical connectivity, facilitating real-time data exchange between physical assets and their digital counterparts. These tools provide standardized protocols for bidirectional communication, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP, OPC UA) or architectures (e.g., cloud-edge) are not detailed in the provided documents. The focus is on **interoperability** and **scalable integration** of heterogeneous data sources."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **modular, service-oriented infrastructure**, supporting scalable and maintainable setups. The framework emphasizes **automated deployment** of runtime artifacts from enriched BIM models, reducing manual intervention. While specific hosting modes (e.g., cloud-based, edge, hybrid) are not specified, the architecture is designed for **flexibility** and **extensibility**, enabling integration with existing AECO systems and future upgrades."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through **standardized integration frameworks** and **interoperability** between the DT and external systems. The framework prioritizes seamless communication with AECO-specific tools and workflows, though specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) or external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not mentioned in the provided documents. The emphasis is on **unified data exchange** and **modular service integration** to support broader ecosystem adoption."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, with a particular focus on **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie, ISO 19650) are not explicitly listed, the framework is designed to ensure compatibility with existing AECO systems and regulatory mandates. The model-driven approach promotes **consistency** and **reusability** across projects, aligning with domain-wide adoption goals."
]
